text:
YOLOPARK is a toy manufacturer, it focuses on the research and development of licensed models and toys. It is based in Hong Kong, China. It was founded in 2009.
__TOC__

Advance Model Kits

The Advance Model Kit range of kits averages 20cm in height. Coming out of the box in preassembled, prepainted pieces, this line offers more of a snap-together action figure experience than traditional model kits.
